sections.title: Before completing Prince Ali Rescue quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I come through this gate?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: You must pay a toll of 10 gold coins to pass.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thank you. I'll walk around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who does my money go to?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: The money goes to the city of Al-Kharid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear, I don't actually seem to have enough money.

sections.title: After completing Prince Ali Rescue quest

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I come through this gate?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: You may pass for free, you are a friend of Al-Kharid.

sections.title: During Death to the Dorgeshuun with Prince Ali Rescue completed

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can we come through this gate?

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: You may pass for free, for you are a friend of Al-Kharid, but your goblin friend must stay on this side.

lines.speaker: Guard
lines.text: Why do you think this gate is here, if not to keep the goblins out of Al Kharid?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But Zanik isn't like the other goblins!

lines.speaker: Zanik
lines.text: Nevermind, player name. I don't think we need to go to Al Kharid anyway!

sections.title: During Leagues without having the required areas unlocked

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can I come through this gate?

lines.speaker: Border Guard
lines.text: You cannot pass as you haven't unlocked access to both the Misthalin and Kharidian Desert areas in this League.
